name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE:  King Plus Adult Dog Food - Beef 15kg
description: King Plus Adult Dog Food Beef , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein and brewer's yeast for immune support. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult large breed dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ................. 18% Fat ....................... 7% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ... 4% Crude Ash ............................10% INGREDIENTS: Wheat, Corn, Processed Animal Protein, Wheat Middlings, Boncalit, Animal Fat, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Flavour, Flaxseed, Salt, Dried Brewers Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
